pick_notes.1:
A price play to start Saratoga. We give American Grant about a 14% chance in the mile-and-an-eighth dirt claimer — not the likeliest winner, but the board has it longer than we do, and an eight-point gap on a route horse this price is where a payout lives. Second on our figures, near enough the top that the odds look generous.

Fair is 6/1; the number to demand is 7/1 or better. It's a long price the crowd tends to leave alone, so it should still be there at post — a swing, one unit, no chasing it short.
pick_notes.2:
A closer with the pace on its side. Emergency Nine is a maiden in the five-and-a-half turf, and the race sets up contested — three early types who'll be busy with each other — while this one runs late. We raised its number for that shape. Our 17% sits eight points over the board.

Fair 5/1, play 11/2 or better. It's a long enough price that the money should leave it alone into post, so the value ought to survive. The risk is the plain one for a closer: if the speed doesn't cook and someone steals an easy lead, it's running for second. A unit at the price.
pick_notes.4:
The widest gap on either card today, and the one to circle. We make Hot Gossip a 21% chance in the one-mile dirt allowance-claimer — twelve and a half points clear of the board — and it's clean: tops our figures, even pace, nothing loose on the lead to complicate it. When our number is this far off the market on a horse we rate best in the race, that's the whole reason to be here.

Fair 7/2, play 4/1 or better. And the durability read likes it — a price the crowd tends to leave alone, so it should still be live at post. Our best number of the day.
pick_notes.5:
A longshot to close our Saratoga card. We give Pelican Pride about a 16% chance in the mile-and-a-sixteenth turf maiden, a seven-point edge on a horse the board has written longer. It sits second on our figures, close enough to the top that the price reads generous.

Fair 11/2, play 6/1 or better. A maiden route, so the form is thin and a green trip is the real risk — but it's a long price that should hold to post, so a unit at the number is worth the swing.

subject: SAR · Sun Jul 19 — 10 races, 4 flags, 6 passes
